regions.rationale: Tight zoom on the Keycloak card while the user types credentials and clicks Sign In. Centre auto-derived from click bboxes (username at top, Sign In at bottom of card).

The two-credential-modes beat. Camera ramps in from t=26s (right after the 'Set up a provider' click + navigation) reaching peak at t=28s, then dwells through the API Key click (t=36.77s) and well into the closing narration. Ramps out by t≈41s. rect_css fixes centre on the tabs+input row regardless of where the user's stray clicks landed inside the card.
